description: Benchmark tests for phase-c-integrator skill - Ten-Step Cycle Phase C orchestration (C.1 Commit, C.2 Merge/PR)

evals.name: commit-generation
evals.prompt: Execute Phase C C.1: Generate conventional commits from staged changes. Files changed: backend/api/auth/github_oauth.py (new), backend/tests/test_github_oauth.py (new), backend/models/oauth_account.py (new). Feature: oauth2-social-login.

assertions.name: uses_conventional_commit_type
assertions.description: Commit message must start with conventional type (feat/fix/refactor/test)

assertions.name: includes_scope
assertions.description: Commit should include a scope in parentheses

assertions.name: references_spec
assertions.description: Commit body or footer should reference the OpenSpec

evals.name: pr-creation
evals.prompt: Execute Phase C C.2: Create pull request for feature/oauth2-social-login → main. Include spec reference and task completion summary.

assertions.name: creates_pr_with_title
assertions.description: Should create PR with descriptive title
assertions.check: output.includes('PR') || output.includes('Pull Request') || output.includes('pull request') || output.includes('title:')

assertions.name: references_openspec
assertions.description: PR description should reference the OpenSpec proposal

assertions.name: lists_completed_tasks
assertions.description: PR description should list completed tasks

evals.name: branch-finisher-integration
evals.prompt: Phase C post-merge: Invoke branch-finisher skill to clean up feature/oauth2-social-login branch after PR merged to main.

assertions.name: invokes_branch_finisher
assertions.description: Should call branch-finisher skill after merge
assertions.check: output.includes('branch-finisher') || output.includes('branch finisher') || output.includes('cleanup') || output.includes('clean up')

assertions.name: deletes_feature_branch
assertions.description: Should delete the merged feature branch

assertions.name: removes_worktrees
assertions.description: Should remove any git worktrees created during Phase B

evals.name: multi-commit-orchestration
evals.prompt: Phase C C.1 strategic commit: Group 12 changed files into logical commits for oauth2-social-login feature. Files span: models, services, API handlers, tests, frontend.

assertions.name: groups_into_multiple_commits
assertions.description: Should create multiple logical commits rather than one large commit

assertions.name: groups_by_domain
assertions.description: Each commit should correspond to a logical domain (models, services, etc.)

assertions.name: uses_atomic_commits
assertions.description: Each commit should be self-contained and buildable

evals.name: merge-conflict-handling
evals.prompt: Phase C C.2 merge: Attempting to merge feature/oauth2-social-login into main. Conflict detected in backend/config/settings.py. Handle gracefully.

assertions.name: detects_merge_conflict
assertions.description: Should detect and report the merge conflict

assertions.name: identifies_conflict_files
assertions.description: Should identify which files have conflicts

assertions.name: provides_resolution_guidance
assertions.description: Should guide the developer through conflict resolution
